company_description: Workday is a leading enterprise cloud software company providing AI-powered applications for human capital management, financial management, and planning for organizations of all sizes.

products.name: Workday Human Capital Management (HCM)
products.description: Comprehensive cloud-based HCM suite covering core HR, workforce management, talent management, and employee experience with embedded AI (LEARN AI).

products.name: Workday Financial Management
products.description: Enterprise financial management platform covering accounting, revenue management, billing, and financial reporting with AI-driven insights (LEARN AI).

products.name: Workday Payroll
products.description: Integrated payroll solution that automates payroll calculations, compliance, and reporting within the Workday platform.

products.name: Workday Adaptive Planning
products.description: Cloud-based enterprise planning platform for budgeting, forecasting, and financial modeling with collaborative workflows and AI-assisted scenario planning (LEARN AI).

products.name: Workday Spend Management
products.description: Unified spend management solution covering procurement, sourcing, supplier management, and expense reporting within the Workday ecosystem.

products.name: Workday Recruiting
products.description: End-to-end recruiting solution with AI-powered candidate matching, job requisition management, and hiring workflow automation (LEARN AI).

products.name: Workday Learning
products.description: Enterprise learning management system embedded in Workday HCM for delivering, tracking, and managing employee training and development.

products.name: Workday Talent & Performance
products.description: Talent management module for performance reviews, goal setting, succession planning, and career development within the Workday platform.

products.name: Workday Compensation
products.description: Compensation planning and management solution for designing, administering, and analyzing employee compensation programs.

products.name: Workday Benefits Administration
products.description: Benefits administration module for managing employee benefits enrollment, eligibility, and compliance within the Workday HCM suite.

products.name: Workday Absence Management
products.description: Leave and absence management solution for tracking, approving, and reporting on employee time-off and leave of absence requests.

products.name: Workday Time Tracking
products.description: Time and attendance tracking solution integrated with Workday HCM and Payroll for accurate workforce time capture and compliance.

products.name: Workday Data Cloud
products.description: Enterprise data platform that connects people and financial data across the full ecosystem to fuel intelligence and advanced analytics (LEARN AI).

products.name: Workday Prism Analytics
products.description: Self-service analytics and data blending tool that allows organizations to combine Workday data with external sources for richer reporting and insights.

products.name: Workday People Analytics
products.description: AI-powered workforce analytics solution that surfaces insights and augmented analytics about workforce trends and risks (LEARN AI).

products.name: Sana (Workday AI)
products.description: Workday's superintelligence AI platform that automates work across HR, Finance, and IT through agentic AI capabilities embedded across the Workday suite (CREATE AI / LEARN AI).

products.name: Workday Illuminate
products.description: Workday's next-generation AI engine powering intelligent automation, recommendations, and insights across the Workday platform (CREATE AI / LEARN AI).

products.name: Workday Deployment Agent
products.description: AI-powered deployment agent that delivers real-time configuration intelligence and troubleshooting within the Workday tenant (LEARN AI).

products.name: BP Optimize Agent
products.description: Embedded AI tool for real-time process mining that continuously scans business processes for anomalies and performance problems (LEARN AI).

products.name: Workday Extend (Platform Extensibility)
products.description: Low-code application development platform that allows partners and customers to build and deploy custom apps on the Workday platform.

products.name: Workday Integration Cloud
products.description: Integration platform and toolset for connecting Workday with third-party systems using pre-built connectors, Workday Studio, and APIs.

products.name: Workday Studio
products.description: Eclipse-based development environment for building complex integrations between Workday and external systems using XSLT and custom logic.

products.name: Workday Report Writer
products.description: Built-in reporting tool within Workday for creating custom reports, calculated fields, and dashboards using Workday data.

products.name: Workday Calculated Fields
products.description: Configuration feature within Workday that allows administrators to create custom data transformations and derived fields for reporting and business processes.

products.name: Workday Business Process Framework
products.description: Configurable workflow engine within Workday that allows administrators to design, automate, and manage business process flows across HR and Finance.

products.name: Workday Security Administration
products.description: Role-based security configuration framework within Workday for managing user access, security groups, domain policies, and audit controls.

products.name: Workday Financial Planning
products.description: Integrated financial planning module within Workday for operational and strategic planning aligned with financial management data.

products.name: Workday Workforce Planning
products.description: Strategic workforce planning solution that helps organizations model headcount, skills gaps, and future workforce needs.

products.name: Workday Skills Cloud
products.description: AI-powered skills ontology and management platform that maps, infers, and matches employee skills across the organization (LEARN AI).

products.name: Workday VNDLY
products.description: Vendor management system (VMS) for managing contingent workforce, external workers, and statement-of-work engagements.

products.name: Workday GO
products.description: All-in-one HR, finance, and payroll platform designed specifically for midsize businesses with simplified deployment and configuration.

products.name: Workday Marketplace
products.description: Partner and customer app marketplace where AI-driven solutions built on the Workday platform can be discovered and deployed.

products.name: Workday Wellness
products.description: Ecosystem of wellness partner integrations powered by Workday Illuminate AI to connect employees with health and wellbeing resources.

products.name: Workday Journeys
products.description: Personalized employee experience tool that guides workers through key life and work events with curated content and tasks.

products.name: Workday Help
products.description: Case management and knowledge base solution within Workday for HR service delivery and employee self-service support.

products.name: Workday Peakon Employee Voice
products.description: Continuous employee listening and engagement platform that uses AI to surface insights from employee feedback and sentiment (LEARN AI).

products.name: Workday Accounting Center
products.description: High-volume accounting automation solution for financial services firms to process and reconcile large volumes of transactional data.

products.name: Workday Grants Management
products.description: Grants lifecycle management solution for higher education and public sector organizations to track, report, and comply with grant requirements.

products.name: Workday Student
products.description: Student information system for higher education institutions covering admissions, registration, financial aid, and academic records.

products.name: Workday Pro Platform Administrator Certification
products.description: Workday's official certification program for mastering management, testing, and troubleshooting of configurations across the Workday platform.

competitive_products.competitive_context: SAP SuccessFactors competes directly with Workday HCM in the enterprise cloud HR market.
Oracle HCM Cloud is a direct competitor to Workday HCM for enterprise human capital management.
Oracle Fusion Cloud ERP competes with Workday Financial Management in the enterprise cloud ERP space.
SAP S/4HANA Cloud competes with Workday Financial Management for enterprise finance and ERP workloads.
Microsoft Dynamics 365 HR and Finance modules compete with Workday in the midmarket and enterprise ERP space.
Anaplan competes with Workday Adaptive Planning in the enterprise planning and budgeting market.
Ceridian Dayforce competes with Workday HCM and Payroll, particularly in the midmarket segment.
ServiceNow HR Service Delivery competes with Workday Help and employee experience capabilities.

partnership_signals.channel_program: Workday Partner Program (Advisory, Services, Innovation Partners)
partnership_signals.ilt_vilt: Workday Education offers ILT and VILT through partner network and direct training

page_contents.company_homepage: Cloud Technology Platform and ERP System | Workday US Continue Skip to main content Our Technology Platform Become unstoppable on the Workday platform. In today’s ever-changing business landscape, you need more than just software. You need a strategic advantage. Learn how our AI platform gives you the edge to not just keep pace but also to lead. Play Video (3:38) WHAT SETS WORKDAY APART How we keep business moving forever forward. Take your business to new heights with an AI platform that empowers every team to step into their full potential, and gain the confidence to navigate uncertainty, seize opportunities, and drive extraordinary value. Technology Core Sana. Transform entire HR and finance processes to deliver measurable business value with our next-level AI capabilities. Learn More Workday Data Cloud. Connect your people and money data to your full ecosystem— fueling enterprise intelligence and advanced analytics. Learn More Extensibility and interoperability. Build and deploy solutions for your unique needs that connect to your ecosystem on our AI platform. Learn More Workday suite. Transform how you manage your people and money with our suite of solutions built for organizations of all sizes. Learn More Experience. Deliver a unified experience that engages, empowers, and enables unparalleled productivity for all. Read Guide Responsible AI. Our AI governance is ISO 42001 certified—meeting the highest standards for trustworthy innovation. Learn More Platform Agents Deployment Agent Accelerate your Workday journey. Our Deployment Agent delivers real-time configuration intelligence and troubleshooting directly within the tenant, leveraging a secure, expert-only knowledge base to help solve complex functional challenges. Learn More BP Optimize Agent Say goodbye to tedious manual investigation. Our BP Optimize Agent is an embedded AI tool for real-time process mining that continuously scans your business processes for anomalies and performance problems. Learn More “Having the ability to leverage the security and privacy controls within Workday’s trusted enterprise management cloud enables us to confidently spin up new apps to meet our unique needs and drive more value from our Workday investment.” DELIVERING GREATER INNOVATION Innovation powered by partnership. With innovations built by our customers, partners, and Workday, our platform provides you with even more ways to increase agility, transformation, and performance. Explore what’s possible in the W

Carey School of Business at Arizona State University is one of the largest and most innovative business schools in the country, offering highly ranked undergraduate, MBA, and specialized master’s programs. Known for its commitment to inclusivity, research excellence, and real-world impact, W. P. Carey prepares students to lead in a rapidly changing global economy. Available globally.
